title: Craig Smith (rugby league, born 1971)
description: New Zealand rugby league footballer and coach
extract: Craig Smith (born 31 October 1971) is a New Zealand former professional rugby league footballer who played as a prop in the 1990s and 2000s. He played for the South Sydney Rabbitohs, Illawarra Steelers, St. George Illawarra Dragons and the Newcastle Knights as well as representing New Zealand, New Zealand Māori and Queensland.
